info.name: Microsoft Entra Microsoft Graph Identity API
info.description:
RESTful API for managing identity resources in Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure Active Directory) through Microsoft Graph. Provides CRUD operations for users, groups, applications, and service principals enabling directory management, identity governance, and application integration.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Graph Support

request.description: Retrieve a list of service principal objects in the directory. A service principal represents an instance of an application in a tenant and is the identity used for authentication and authorization.

response.name: Collection of service principal objects
